summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WellTrack Phase 3 Super Admin Portal. All 19 test features passed (100%). Tested SA login, dashboard, schools management, school detail, super admins, audit log, and verified school portal still works.
critical_code_review_comments: SA portal correctly uses separate cookie (sa_session_token) from school portal (session_token)
SA login page correctly detects bootstrap mode vs login mode
All SA pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Auto-slug generation works correctly in Add School modal
School provisioning creates school with admin user end-to-end
Add User to school works correctly with role selection
Status badges correctly styled (ACTIVE=green, TRIAL=amber, ARCHIVED=gray)
Audit log shows all actions with timestamps and icons
User menu with logout works correctly
School portal still works independently - login and dashboard functional
seed_data_creation: Created test school 'Test School m4g9b9' during testing - archived after tests completed. Added test user 'testuser2@mooroopna.edu.au' to Mooroopna school.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Super Admin Frontend fully verified. All 19 features tested and passed. SA portal at /sa/* routes works correctly. School portal at /* routes still works. SA uses sa_session_token cookie, school uses session_token cookie. Test school created during testing was archived. Test user added to Mooroopna school during testing.
passed_tests: SA Login page at /sa/login renders with dark theme (bg-slate-900) and sign-in form
SA Login: fill email/password and submit redirects to /sa/dashboard
SA Dashboard: shows stat cards (Total Schools=4, Active=1, Trial=1, Total Students=16)
SA Dashboard: shows recent schools list with status badges (ACTIVE, TRIAL, ARCHIVED)
SA Schools page: shows schools table with all schools
SA Schools page: search filter works (searched 'demo' - 1 result)
SA Schools page: status filter buttons work (Active=1, Trial=1, Archived=2, All=4)
SA Schools page: Add School button opens modal
SA Schools page: Add School modal auto-generates slug from name ('Test Primary School' -> 'test-primary-school')
SA Schools page: provisioning a new school works end-to-end (created 'Test School m4g9b9')
SA School Detail page: navigating to Mooroopna school shows details and users
SA School Detail page: school stats displayed (Students=0, Admins=1, Users=2, Onboarding=Pending)
SA School Detail page: Add User button opens modal and creates user successfully
SA Super Admins page: shows list of super admins with 'YOU' badge for current admin
SA Audit Log page: shows 60 audit entries with timestamps and action icons
SA Sidebar: navigation links work (Dashboard, Schools, Super Admins, Audit Log)
SA Sidebar: user menu with logout works - redirects to /sa/login
School portal still works: /login loads school login page with email/password option
School portal: login with admin@test.com works and shows dashboard with 16 students
